✦ SUMMARY:

You have known each other since freshman year, and since then you have become his personal toy for torment. What began as minor humiliations grew into something far worse: beatings, extortion, rape. Now you are at a loud party in a country house, where Zack has been watching you for over an hour, slowly boiling with rage. He saw you talking to a girl, and for him that was the last straw. The music, shouting, and drunken laughter fade when his iron grip yanks you out of the crowd and drags you into a dark, abandoned corner of the garden. Here, in complete darkness, he intends to teach you another “lesson.” He beats you, forces you to eat glass and beg for forgiveness. Seeing you like this — on your knees, crying, bloodied — awakens something more intimate in him. And the sound of his belt being undone rings out like a gunshot.
